text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! I'm feeling pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While all of the results are yet to be revealed, I
consider this a significant step forward!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't forget to express my thanks to you,
either, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your
diligent work as my test subject day in and day
out!
choice_data_list: This is the result of your hard work, Tachyon.
This is the result of your hard work, Tachyon.
This is another step forward for your research.
This is another step forward for your research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your
diligent work as my test subject day in and day
out!
choice_data_list: This is the result of your hard work, Tachyon.
This is the result of your hard work, Tachyon.
This is another step forward for your research.
This is another step forward for your research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, how kind of you to say that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But I want you to properly accept my gratitude
first.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's put in our best effort so that our work
continues to pay off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Our research has only just begun.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And we cannot afford to slack off. You seem to
understand this well, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's continue at this pace to expand our
potential and surpass the limits of
Umamusume-kind!
